791e0c7c1d8a0a0d669a9a8eb2e23520e38caab3: $$a + b > 1$$

70cdb017964914b7d64950e7cc4b297e36547929: $$b > -2$$

c1af10267348dae24c976fcde483d704ed2f9b06: $$a + b < 1$$

8ce9c5579d88877e052087cee040b02a940d9750: $$b < -2$$

79965be56f0fed75e65744f22e6b257ff77989b8: $$F(x) = \int_{0}^{x} (t - [t]) \, \mathrm{d}t$$

63de4e9922cdb7379258a282769a062f608bab62: $$[x]$$

43ed1ba5e99a1a4028b24a87e28155ef8a99c6a3: $$x$$

9304f17bb9ccb3c44864ee059c6dd582c04d9c30: $$F_{-}^{\prime}(1) - F_{+}^{\prime}(1) =$$

57b09016df46f02ffe1f16f78f129a9a3ff8dce5: $$f(x)$$

9767a1d7865e7e2b69226306e3be521bcaa24ff1: $$x \in [a,b]$$

0f97d34f0c510b1b356b1ec1d20adebecc25ef87: $$\int_{a}^{x} f(t) \mathrm{d}t$$

0fe88f9b8aa8594e58bb847f084d9e4050abdd22: $$f(x)$$

1916496a182e42917133de9042413c6e6371dc09: $$f(x)$$

9392f9d9ae88360f1d3a0b15a4102dab32fc553e: $$x \in [a,b]$$

bd411da43a8c747138784b8591cedf6a79407e39: $$f(x)$$

5a0979f43ccf789b1c84f7fa2e0d1cb858d90590: $$(a,b)$$

eaaa6764cc9d06fdd5b81add524cadce5507a989: $$f(x)$$

126c37330fc82daf094b40bc15b03ec398864728: $$x \in [-a, a]$$

1c1dc9e1bbe522c89f626df2893053aa74bc07f0: $$\int_{-a}^{a} f(x) \mathrm{d}x = 0$$

e643a573cac2ea8154b5a8fa734a40493221d7dd: $$f(x)$$

5c35aeee28a2a3b75b9c8c4209f2bcd932896079: $$T$$

e8f4855321c4e70b2d4b7913646a3a39aeeb88b6: $$\int_{a}^{a + T} f(x) \mathrm{d}x = \int_{0}^{T} f(x) \mathrm{d}x$$

9c3e2901f9d448d25b529352fab4a7a0a068b96b: $$f(x - 5) = \frac{4}{x^2 - 10x}$$

cd1660df4a0eb16212ba8efe01c49603c41750a0: $$\int_0^4 f(2x + 1)\mathrm{d}x$$

8fa75e5d474338f4060426487780d2bee8dde8e2: $$\frac{\pi}{4}$$

30879314eb41ddeb000afbd0495019a301e2badc: $$\int_{\pi}^{2\pi}\left|\sin x\right|\mathrm{d}x\leqslant \int_{\pi}^{2\pi}\sin^2 x\mathrm{d}x$$

ba694bfe34dc3c7380a2a21dc09beb5e5f9d0b92: $$\int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}\frac{x}{1 + \cos x}\mathrm{d}x <   \int_{-\frac{\pi}{4}}^{\frac{\pi}{4}}\left(\frac{\sin x}{1 + x^4} +\frac{1}{1 + x^2}\right)\mathrm{d}x$$

c137964f1d4b7658373a5b97c65fa109d565f49b: $$\int_{a}^{b}f(x)\mathrm{d}x\leqslant \int_{c}^{d}f(x)\mathrm{d}x,[a,b]\subset [c,d],f(x)$$

0bc9f092dd1f10cbdb48b1ff84472a29ffea8fa3: $$x\in [c,d]$$

b038c2d9e06722aaa28180091e6be111453c1b84: $$\int_{-1}^{1}\left|f(x)\right|\mathrm{d}x = 2\int_{0}^{1}\left|f(x)\right|\mathrm{d}x,f(x)$$

82b2180207d87502ce0c5e1426a8b15a311fcc09: $$x\in [-1,1]$$

cfb9003bffdbf77d7e417b93d7d468467a884ae1: $$\lim_{n\to \infty}\sum_{i = 1}^{n}\frac{1}{\sqrt{in}} = \underline{\quad}\color{blue}$$
